decisions: FAM-09 staleTime nuance: production QueryClient ships staleTime=30s + refetchOnWindowFocus=true; the ≤5s budget applies to wire convergence once a refetch is queued AND to the user-facing FAM-05 Ricarica action. Future Phase 5 push channel will collapse trigger time to ≤1s under steady state.
Convergence test uses page.reload() with localStorage cache cleared (FAM-05 Ricarica path) instead of hacking React Query internals via test globals.
3 stale test fixtures auto-fixed in Plan 02-08 because pnpm build is a hard prerequisite for any production deploy verification (Rule 1 + Rule 3 scope).
